metadata.name: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
metadata.description: Trivia based on Jeff Kinney's Diary of a Wimpy Kid book series.
metadata.author: Trivial World Team

questions.questionText: In what U.S. state does Greg Heffley live?
questions.answerText: No specific state is named (left intentionally vague)
questions.tidbits: The Diary of a Wimpy Kid series has sold over 250 million copies worldwide and been translated into 65 languages.

questions.questionText: What is the name of the street where Greg's family lives?
questions.tidbits: Jeff Kinney originally wrote Diary of a Wimpy Kid as a webcomic on Funbrain.com starting in 2004 before it became a book.

questions.questionText: In 'The Long Haul,' the Heffley family travels to which relative's celebration?
questions.tidbits: Greg Heffley's school is set in a fictional town in the northeastern United States.

questions.questionText: What campground/resort does the Heffley family visit in 'The Long Haul'?
In 'Old School,' the Hardscrabble Farms trip takes the kids to what kind of location?
In 'Cabin Fever,' a blizzard traps Greg's family at home. What does Greg do to get money before the storm?
questions.answerText: He shovels snow (tries to get ahead of the storm by pre-selling snow-shoveling)

questions.questionText: In 'The Getaway,' the Heffleys vacation at a resort called Isla de Corales. In what region is this resort set?
In 'Big Shot,' Greg joins a basketball team. What is the name of the rec-league team Greg ends up on?
What is the name of the middle school Greg attends throughout most of the series?
In 'No Brainer,' Greg's school faces possible closure. What competing school are students potentially transferred to?
On which floor of their house does Greg's room appear to be located?
What is the name of the subdivision or neighborhood where the Heffley family lives?
In 'Rodrick Rules,' where does Rodrick's unsupervised party take place?
questions.answerText: The Heffley home while the parents are away

questions.questionText: In 'Wrecking Ball,' the Heffley family starts a home renovation. What room does the project originally start in?
In 'The Meltdown,' what outdoor location becomes the battlefield between neighborhood kids during the snow war?
questions.answerText: The hill at the end of Surrey Street

questions.questionText: In 'Deep End,' the Heffleys travel by RV. What is the intended final destination of their road trip?
What is the name of the rival school that Greg's friend group competes against in various academic and sports events?
In 'The Last Straw,' Frank Heffley threatens to send Greg to a military school. What is its name?
In 'Dog Days,' what is the name of the upscale neighborhood facility where Greg tries to spend his summer?
In 'The Ugly Truth,' where does Greg's school hold the fall dance that causes him embarrassment?
Who directed the first live-action Diary of a Wimpy Kid film released in 2010?
questions.tidbits: Rowley's father is portrayed as overprotective and often disapproves of Greg's influence on his son.

questions.questionText: Which actor played Greg Heffley in the 2010 live-action film?
questions.tidbits: The "Cheese Touch" is one of the most iconic elements of the series — touching a piece of cheese on the blacktop gives you the "touch" until you pass it to someone else.

questions.questionText: On which streaming platform was the animated Diary of a Wimpy Kid film released in 2021?
questions.tidbits: Rodrick's band is named "Löded Diper" — a purposely misspelled name that reflects his personality.

questions.questionText: How many live-action Diary of a Wimpy Kid theatrical films were released between 2010 and 2017? A) Two, B) Three, C) Four, D) Five
Which book served as the basis for the 2022 Disney+ animated film 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules'?
Jeff Kinney originally published Diary of a Wimpy Kid online before it became a book. On which website did it first appear?
What is the name of the fictional in-universe horror movie that Greg and Rowley watch on their date in 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid'?
questions.answerText: The Foot (or a monster movie — Greg describes a scary movie; the specific fictional title is not named)

questions.questionText: In the live-action films, which actor played Rowley Jefferson?
Jeff Kinney won which prestigious award for his contributions to children's literature, given by Nickelodeon's Kids' Choice Awards multiple times?
questions.answerText: Kids' Choice Award for Favorite Book

questions.questionText: In 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul' (2017 film), which actor replaced Zachary Gordon as Greg Heffley?
Who is the author of the Diary of a Wimpy Kid series?
What is the name of Greg's kind but naive best friend throughout the series?
What is the name of Greg's mother who runs the household and frequently embarrasses him?
What is the first name of Greg's father who tries to toughen Greg up throughout the series?
What is the name of the popular girl at school whom Greg has a crush on in the early books?
What is the name of the school bully who frequently torments Greg and Rowley throughout the series?
In what year was the first Diary of a Wimpy Kid book published?
What is the title of the 17th main Diary of a Wimpy Kid book, published in 2022, in which Rodrick's band goes on tour?
What is the name of the spin-off book series featuring Rowley Jefferson as the main narrator?
What is the name of the elderly neighbor on Surrey Street who often causes problems for Greg?
What is Greg Heffley's older brother's name?
questions.tidbits: Jeff Kinney spent about 8 years writing and refining the original Diary of a Wimpy Kid before it was published as a book in 2007.

questions.questionText: What is Greg Heffley's younger brother's name?
questions.tidbits: The books are written in a diary/journal format with Greg's handwritten-style text and simple stick-figure illustrations.

questions.questionText: What is the name of Greg's best friend throughout the series?
questions.tidbits: The first Diary of a Wimpy Kid film was released in 2010, with Zachary Gordon playing Greg Heffley.

questions.questionText: In book 1, what disgusting object do Greg and Rowley dare other kids to touch, causing years of trouble?
In 'Rodrick Rules,' what secret does Rodrick blackmail Greg with after a party?
questions.answerText: Greg's embarrassing incident at a girl's house (he got locked in the basement bathroom)

questions.questionText: What is the name of Rodrick's heavy-metal band?
In 'The Last Straw,' Greg's dad threatens to send him where if he doesn't shape up?
In 'Dog Days,' what is the name of the country club where Greg tries to spend his summer?
questions.answerText: Whirley Street Kids' club / the pool club (Leisure Towers pool)

questions.questionText: In 'The Ugly Truth,' Greg and Rowley have a falling out. What event causes them to reconnect at the end of the book?
questions.answerText: Rowley's grandmother's funeral / Greg speaking at the ceremony

questions.questionText: In 'Double Down,' Greg becomes obsessed with making a horror film. What is the name of his film concept?
What is the infectious playground game where touching a moldy piece of cheese passes a social curse to another student?
What sport does Rodrick play badly in his heavy-metal band?
In 'The Third Wheel,' Greg prepares for the Valentine's Day dance. What problem does he have finding a date?
questions.answerText: He keeps getting paired or left out unexpectedly

questions.questionText: What happens to Manny at the end of 'The Meltdown' that reveals he is more capable than everyone thought?
questions.answerText: He leads his own group of younger kids in the snow war

questions.questionText: In 'Cabin Fever,' what community infraction does Greg accidentally commit involving holiday decorations?
questions.answerText: He accidentally defaces the school's holiday fundraising banner

questions.questionText: In 'Hard Luck,' Greg relies on a Magic 8-Ball to guide his decisions after losing his friendship with Rowley. How does it work out?
questions.answerText: Poorly — the advice leads him into more trouble

questions.questionText: In 'No Brainer,' what does Greg discover about the school's history that he uses in his campaign to save it?
questions.answerText: Historical significance of the school building

questions.questionText: In 'Wrecking Ball,' the home renovation goes drastically wrong. What causes the project to spiral out of control?
questions.answerText: Each fix creates a bigger problem, escalating the chaos

questions.questionText: In 'The Deep End,' what forces the Heffley family to abandon their RV trip before reaching their destination?
questions.answerText: The RV park floods and they get stranded

questions.questionText: What is the name of the haunted attraction Greg and Rowley try to set up in 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid' to make money?
Diary of a Wimpy Kid is illustrated in a style that mimics what kind of drawing?
questions.tidbits: Jeff Kinney was a computer-game designer before becoming a full-time author and still works on game projects.

questions.questionText: What is the name of the in-universe comic strip that Rowley creates that becomes very popular at school?
questions.tidbits: The illustrations in the books are meant to look like a kid's drawings, which Kinney deliberately keeps simple.

questions.questionText: What is the name of Greg's own comic strip that he tries (and fails) to get published in the school paper?
Jeff Kinney draws Greg Heffley's face with two dots for eyes and a line for a mouth. What does Kinney say inspired this minimalist style?
questions.answerText: His own childhood doodles / keeping it simple so kids feel they could draw it too

questions.questionText: In the books, what visual element appears on every page to make it look like Greg is writing in an actual diary?
questions.answerText: Lined notebook paper (ruled lines in the background)

questions.questionText: What is the name of the superhero comic Greg and Rowley create together in 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid'?
questions.answerText: They don't create a superhero comic — Greg writes 'Creighton the Cretin'; Rowley makes 'Zoo-Wee Mama!' They briefly collaborate on a story called 'The Big Ones'

questions.questionText: In 'Diper Överlöde,' Rodrick's band creates a graphic novel/comic. What is the name of that graphic novel?
questions.answerText: Diper Överlöde (the in-book band graphic novel tie-in)

questions.questionText: Jeff Kinney studied what subject in college before becoming an author and game designer?
questions.answerText: Computer science (and criminal justice — he studied both; he is best known for citing computer science/game design background)

questions.questionText: Which spin-off book series features Rowley Jefferson as the main character and narrator, with a fairy-tale visual style?
questions.answerText: Rowley Jefferson's Awesome Friendly Adventure series

questions.questionText: In 'Cabin Fever,' a drawing Greg made appears on wanted posters around school. What did he accidentally deface?
questions.answerText: A holiday fund-raising banner (he drew on the school's Christmas banner)

questions.questionText: What color is the cover of the original first Diary of a Wimpy Kid book?
What word appears on the cover of the book that Greg objects to in the first chapter?
What visual style does Jeff Kinney use for Rowley's comic Zoo-Wee Mama — how does it differ from a typical comic?
questions.answerText: It is intentionally crude and childlike, even simpler than Greg's drawings

questions.questionText: The books are categorized as what hybrid genre that combines prose with illustrations on every page?
What is the name of the fictional in-world video game series whose cartoons inspire Greg's imagination?
What physical format do the books use to present Greg's text, making it look handwritten even though it is printed?
What is the title of Jeff Kinney's autobiographical-style book about his own experience writing Diary of a Wimpy Kid?
questions.answerText: Diary of an Awesome Friendly Kid

questions.questionText: What is the name of Jeff Kinney's independent bookshop he opened in Massachusetts?
In 'Big Shot,' Jeff Kinney uses sports illustrations that differ from the regular diary art style. What sport are they for?
In what year did the animated Diary of a Wimpy Kid film debut on Disney+, rebooting the franchise with a new art style?
Greg firmly refuses to call his writing book a 'diary.' What does he insist it should be called instead?
questions.tidbits: The book series has inspired a long-running musical adaptation that has toured the United States.

questions.questionText: In 'Hard Luck,' Greg relies on a device to make decisions for him. What is it?
questions.tidbits: Greg's journal is described as a "diary" even though he insists it's not — he calls it a journal to seem less childish.

questions.questionText: Greg and Rowley set up a 'haunted house' to earn money. How many customers do they get on opening night?
If Greg has 3 best friends at the start of middle school but loses 2 by the end of book 1, how many does he have left?
questions.answerText: One (Rowley, though their friendship is strained)

questions.questionText: In 'The Meltdown,' Greg and Rowley build a snow fort. What do they call the territory they are defending?
questions.answerText: Surrey Street (their street / their side of the hill)

questions.questionText: In 'Wrecking Ball,' the Heffleys renovate their house. What was the original plan for the new addition?
In 'Deep End,' the Heffleys go on an extended RV trip. Greg tries to problem-solve a way off the trip. What is the campsite situation that finally forces them home?
questions.answerText: The RV park floods and they're stranded

questions.questionText: In 'No Brainer,' Greg devises a plan to save his school. What key piece of information does he use to argue the school should stay open?
questions.answerText: He finds evidence about the school's historical/founding significance (the school's value to the community)

questions.questionText: Greg's mom Susan writes a parenting blog. What does Greg fear most about the blog?
questions.answerText: That his classmates will read embarrassing stories about him

questions.questionText: In 'Old School,' the students are required to give up all technology for the Hardscrabble Farms trip. Name one device they are NOT allowed to bring.
In book 1, why does Greg start writing in the diary/journal in the first place?
questions.answerText: His mother gives it to him and tells him to write in it

questions.questionText: In 'Rodrick Rules,' why does Greg agree to keep Rodrick's party a secret from their parents?
questions.answerText: To avoid getting in trouble himself / Rodrick has embarrassing information on him

questions.questionText: In 'The Last Straw,' what plan does Greg come up with to avoid being sent to military school by his dad?
questions.answerText: He tries to become more responsible and joins soccer

questions.questionText: In 'Dog Days,' how does Greg end up getting access to the country club pool he desperately wants to join?
questions.answerText: He pretends to be Rowley's guest

questions.questionText: In 'The Ugly Truth,' what causes Greg and Rowley's friendship to fall apart at the start of the book?
questions.answerText: A fight over Greg using Rowley as a stepping stone to become popular

questions.questionText: In 'Cabin Fever,' what scheme does Greg try to use to raise money before the blizzard hits?
questions.answerText: Selling pre-orders for snow shoveling services

questions.questionText: In 'The Third Wheel,' Greg creates an elaborate scheme to attend the Valentine's Day dance. What does he discover about how the couples are assigned?
questions.answerText: The dance uses a computer matching system that he tries to manipulate

questions.questionText: In 'Double Down,' Greg launches his horror movie project to cash in on the horror trend. What goes wrong with the production?
questions.answerText: Everything spirals out of control with disastrous results

questions.questionText: In 'Big Shot,' what flaw in Greg's basketball strategy does his team captain try to correct?
questions.answerText: Greg refuses to pass the ball and tries to score on his own

questions.questionText: What problem does Greg encounter when he tries to run a haunted house business in his neighborhood?
What is the name of the video game Greg and Rowley are obsessed with in 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid'?
questions.tidbits: Rowley is portrayed as more innocent and childlike than Greg, which often creates comedic contrast between the two friends.

questions.questionText: In 'Dog Days,' what sport does Greg try to learn at the country club?
questions.tidbits: The wrestling storyline in various books parodies the exaggerated showmanship of professional wrestling.

questions.questionText: What sport does Greg's dad Frank try to get Greg interested in throughout the series?
In 'Big Shot,' Greg joins a basketball league. Why did he sign up in the first place?
questions.answerText: His parents made him join to get off screens / as a punishment

questions.questionText: In 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid' (book 1), what role does Greg get in the school play, and how does it humiliate him?
questions.answerText: A tree (he is cast as a tree in the school play)

questions.questionText: In 'Rodrick Rules,' what is the name of the video game Rodrick and Greg compete at?
questions.answerText: Twisted Wizard (same game — Rodrick beats Greg's high score)

questions.questionText: In 'The Last Straw,' Greg joins which sport/activity to avoid being sent to military school?
In 'Double Down,' Greg tries to scare his school with what creature he claims is real?
In 'Diper Överlöde,' Greg joins Rodrick on a band tour. What game-like challenge does Greg use to survive backstage life?
questions.answerText: He treats the tour like a video game, collecting 'power-ups' and avoiding hazards

questions.questionText: In 'Big Shot,' what is the final play Greg draws up that leads to the championship game outcome?
questions.answerText: An inbound pass play where Greg is the unexpected shooter / Greg takes the final shot

questions.questionText: What recreational game do Greg and Rowley play in the neighborhood that gets them into trouble in 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid'?
questions.answerText: Playing in the street (pretending to be in a wheelchair)

questions.questionText: What playground game causes social catastrophe when an old piece of cheese is left on the blacktop?
In 'The Meltdown,' what rules does Greg establish for the snow war between the Surrey Street kids and their rivals?
questions.answerText: Territory boundaries and snow weapon rules

questions.questionText: In 'Diary of a Wimpy Kid,' what game do Greg and Rowley play on the street that a driver complains about?
questions.answerText: Playing in the road / pretending to be hit by cars

questions.questionText: In 'The Getaway,' the Heffley family tries to enjoy a beach resort. What water activity does Greg attempt but fail at?
In 'Old School,' students must participate in outdoor activities at Hardscrabble Farms. What task does Greg try hardest to avoid?
In 'Big Shot,' what is the name of the rec league team that Greg's team faces in the final game?
In 'Dog Days,' what happens when Greg tries to play tennis at the country club without knowing the rules?
questions.answerText: He causes chaos and embarrasses himself

questions.questionText: What is the name of the PE teacher at Westmore Middle School who forces Greg into physical activities?
In 'The Last Straw,' how does Greg perform in soccer once he actually joins the team?
questions.answerText: Terribly — he avoids the ball and does the minimum to stay on the team
